name: [UPD+FORM] Echelon: Degradation
description:
Feedback + future Echelon content form can be found here

It's been 20 years since the Shift happened, and over a quarter of the population took the "cure". Since then, Micro/Macro relations have degraded. Micros are no longer seen as people, instead, they are seen as bugs or nuisances. The 20 years that have past since the people who took the 'Miracle Cure' shrunk has caused most people to forget or move on, leaving the victims, micros, to fend for themselves. Micros have to survive on their own, keeping themselves alive underneath the notice of normal people, or 'macros'. The macro's aren't going to just let them live, however. They are now a commodity, with some caught micros being sold on the market for various reasons. Some jobs, like Catchers, even hunt down micro colonies for profit. Despite this adversity, microkind has managed to hold on, surviving in-between the cracks.

Rumors and whispers of nice Macros existing, harboring and helping Micros and colonies do exist, but if they do, they are far and few between.

A proxy is highly recommended! (Mostly for keeping the size difference, since JLLM struggles with that)

I would recommend using a proxy when the bot struggles to get size or certain aspects right, and use JLLM every other time, at it makes the roleplay feel a lot more real/casual than most proxies (at times)

Play as a "Macro" (just a normal person) or a Micro, a 2-3 inch tall person who was a victim of the Shift and took the Miracle Cure, in a free simulator where there is few to no restrictions.

This simulator focuses on more rough and survival aspect of being a micro, where you have to fight tooth and nail to survive in a harsh world where everything is bigger than you, and deathly threats loom around every corner. Or, play as a Macro. You can interact with the Micros, take them in, hunt them down, keep them as a pet, or other things...

If you wish for a simulator where Micro/Macro relations improved, and they had been reintegrated into society, you can find it here!

I would recommend stating if you are an micro or a macro/normal person either in the first message or persona. The bot may get confused if you don't do so, or it may assume you are one or the other randomly or based on context clues.

Do you find it hard to think of certain scenarios? Is the scope too big, and need some help? Here is some possible starts you can use! If you want something to be added to it, feel free to tell me!

Character description is open! Besides one exception, no real secret lore to uncover for this one, feel free to check out the character description. I've kept it below 2k so that longer RPs can sustain it without sacrificing tokens.

Due to the potential harsh nature of this bot, Dead Dove has been added. (Still no clue what constitutes it, but I feel I should put it, just to be safe)

I hope you enjoy!
creator: NullSeu
